person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Alice de Lucy was born about 1129 and passed away about 1197.

Alice de Lucy married Odonell d' Umfraville, Lord Prudhoe, Otterbourne, Harbottle, & Riddesdale, son of Odinell I d' Umfraville, before 1173. They had 4 sons & 2 daughters:

1.) Robert

2.) William

3.) Richard

4.) Gilbert

5.) Margaret/Margery, wife of Sir William d'Aubeney

6.) Alice, wife of William Bertram, & of Roger FitzWalter

Alice de Lucy died before 1219.

sourceList.title: Alice de Lucy, "Find A Grave Index"

zh.lifeSummary: 當Aveline Lucy於大約1121年出生在法國諾門迪奧內盧瑟時，她的父親Richard de Lucy34歲，母親Rohese de Boulogne33歲。她與Odinel d'Umfraville II結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1179年7月14日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德普盧多享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德可哈姆聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Aveline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It seems to represent an Old French pet form of the Germanic name   Avila   (a derivative of   Avis  ), but it could also be an elaborated form of   Ava .

en.lifeSummary: When Aveline Lucy was born about 1121, in Lucé, Orne, Normandy, France, her father, Richard de Lucy, was 34 and her mother, Rohese de Boulogne, was 33. She married Odinel d'Umfraville II. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 July 1179, in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in St Andrew's Church, Hexham, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aveline Lucy est née environ 1121, à Lucé, Orne, Normandie, France, son père, Richard de Lucy, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Boulogne, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Odinel d'Umfraville II. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 juillet 1179, à Prudhoe, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à St Andrew's Church, Hexham, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Aveline Lucy(이)가 대략 1121년 프랑스 노먼디 른 뤼ce에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Lucy(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rohese de Boulogne(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Odinel d'Umfraville II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1179년 7월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 프루드호에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 헤스함 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Odinel d'Umfraville II. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aveline Lucy родилась около 1121 г. в местности лукe, орн, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Richard de Lucy было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Boulogne, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Odinel d'Umfraville II. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 июля 1179 г. в местности прудхо, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности ст андрю'с чурч, хексхам, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.
